---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement.
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What is the user trying to do that's currently hard / impossible?

## Proposal

What would you add/change? How should it behave?

## Alternatives

What else did you consider? Why would your proposal win?

## Scope

- [ ] `core/` (Python)
- [ ] `web/` (site)
- [ ] `notebooks/`
- [ ] `scripts/` / tooling
- [ ] docs

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes, can send a PR
- [ ] Partially, need pointers
- [ ] No, requesting only
